methodology.rule: upper-level events generate lower-level pressures, constraints, or consequences

daily_stack_template.generated_from: publicly observable reality modeled through REP

field_guide.date: Reference date of the daily stack.
field_guide.status: Operational status of the daily stack.
field_guide.levels: Ordered territorial levels included in the stack.
field_guide.registry_files: Paths to the registry files for the day.
field_guide.checkpoint_files: Paths to the checkpoint files for the day.
field_guide.dominant_pressure: Primary systemic pressure observed across the stack.
field_guide.core_issue: Main structural issue identified for the day.
field_guide.vertical_logic: Map describing how each level translates the daily pressure.
field_guide.methodology: Embedded methodological reminder for daily construction.
field_guide.generated_from: Description of the observational basis of the stack.
field_guide.generated_at: UTC timestamp of daily stack generation.

required_rules: there must be one registry file per level
there must be one checkpoint file per level
levels must remain in top-down territorial order
dominant_pressure must summarize the whole day
core_issue must identify the structural problem of the day
generated_at must be a UTC timestamp
notes: Operational template for creating the daily master record in REP Reality Stack.
